metadata.description: Knowledge Vault plugin for Claude Code — project-scoped knowledge base with academic collection via MCP, Zotero integration, preserved originals + bibliographic slugs, PageIndex tree indexing per PDF, 4-tier reasoning-routed query, and PDF enrichment via Unpaywall and/or Sci-Hub (opt-in)

plugins.name: knowledge-vault
plugins.description: Project-scoped knowledge base with ingestion (URL, Zotero, PubMed/Scholar), preserved originals + bibliographic slugs, PageIndex tree indexing per PDF, 4-tier reasoning-routed query, PDF enrichment via Unpaywall and/or Sci-Hub (opt-in), compilation, and Obsidian browsing.
